sqlMap.select: SELECT A.*, GROUP_CONCAT( ft2.fileName ORDER BY ft2.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS attachmentsname FROM ( SELECT vt.*, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS admonishfilename FROM p_wen_visit_t vt LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft1.id, vt.admonishfile) WHERE vt.validflag > 0 AND vt.id = $id$ GROUP BY vt.id ) A LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft2 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft2.id, A.attachments) GROUP BY A.id

SELECT COUNT(vt.id) FROM p_wen_visit_t vt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON vt.personnelid=pt.id WHERE vt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag>0
vt.personnelid = $personnelid$

SELECT vt.* FROM p_wen_visit_t vt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON vt.personnelid=pt.id WHERE vt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag>0
vt.personnelid = $personnelid$
ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(vt.startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %h:%i:%m') desc

SELECT vt.* FROM p_wen_visit_t vt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON vt.personnelid=pt.id WHERE vt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag>0 AND vt.personnelid = $personnelid$ ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(vt.startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %h:%i:%m') desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_wen_visit_t (personnelid,startdate,enddate, sensitivenode,nodename,nodememo, activitytype,activitymemo, activitydirection,directionmemo, relatedplace,placememo,placecharacter, activityform,formmemo, activitything,thingmemo, activityprocess,acceptance, traffictype,togetherperson, staytype,staymemo, hotelintime,hotelouttime, hotelname,hotelroom, hotelcode,hoteladdress, findunit,handleresult,admonishfile, returntype,returnvehicle,vehiclememo, powerunit,personstate, returncollect,returnpunish, punishcontent,unitreply,attachments, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,'$startdate$','$enddate$', $sensitivenode$,'$nodename$','$nodememo$', '$activitytype$','$activitymemo$', '$activitydirection$','$directionmemo$', '$relatedplace$','$placememo$','$placecharacter$', '$activityform$','$formmemo$', '$activitything$','$thingmemo$', '$activityprocess$','$acceptance$', '$traffictype$','$togetherperson$', '$staytype$','$staymemo$', '$hotelintime$','$hotelouttime$', '$hotelname$','$hotelroom$', '$hotelcode$','$hoteladdress$', '$findunit$','$handleresult$','$admonishfile$', '$returntype$','$returnvehicle$','$vehiclememo$', '$powerunit$','$personstate$', '$returncollect$','$returnpunish$', '$punishcontent$','$unitreply$','$attachments$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_wen_visit_t SET validflag = 0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(vt.id) FROM zfw_p_wen_visit_t vt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON vt.personnelid=pt.id WHERE vt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag>0
vt.personnelid = $personnelid$

SELECT vt.* FROM zfw_p_wen_visit_t vt LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t pt ON vt.personnelid=pt.id WHERE vt.validflag > 0 AND pt.validflag>0
vt.personnelid = $personnelid$
ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(vt.startdate,'%Y-%m-%d %h:%i:%m') desc

SELECT A.*, GROUP_CONCAT( ft2.fileName ORDER BY ft2.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS attachmentsname FROM ( SELECT vt.*, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS admonishfilename FROM zfw_p_wen_visit_t vt LEFT JOIN zfw_sys_file_t ft1 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft1.id, vt.admonishfile) WHERE vt.validflag > 0 AND vt.id = $id$ GROUP BY vt.id ) A LEFT JOIN zfw_sys_file_t ft2 ON FIND_IN_SET(ft2.id, A.attachments) GROUP BY A.id
sqlMap.update: UPDATE zfw_p_wen_visit_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
